description: Embed the Kepler.gl viewer for a workspace UDF. Use {{udf_1}} to bind the connected UDF via a slot, or supply a plain UDF name as a fallback.

udf.description: UDF slot placeholder (e.g. {{udf_1}}) or plain UDF name whose results should be displayed in Kepler.gl.

title.description: Accessible title for the embedded Kepler.gl map

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "min-height: 480px; border-radius: 8px")

propsSchema.description: Embeds the Kepler.gl viewer for a UDF in the workspace. Accepts a {{udf_N}} slot placeholder or a plain UDF name. Uses a parquet share URL when the canvas is shared; falls back to a temporary GeoJSON upload otherwise.
